programme.title: Qandeel
programme.desc: The life, death and impact of Pakistan's working-class icon Qandeel Baloch, killed in 2016 after becoming a social media celebrity. This film tells Qandeel's story through her own videos and media appearances. A young, fearless woman who collided with Pakistan's mainstream media, Qandeel exposed the religious right and challenged middle-class morality.

programme.title: I am Alena | Trans actors
programme.desc: There's nothing here for me': transgender and trapped living a half-life in the deep south | Trans actors: 'Why can't you just represent me as a person?'

programme.title: Can Yanis Varoufakis save Europe?
programme.desc: The Greek economist is back battling the EU establishment, this time at the helm of a new movement, DiEM25. Backed by Pamela Anderson and the world's most famous cyborg, he is fighting ultra-right populism with a radical agenda he thinks can restore people's lost faith in democracy. As the European parliamentary elections approach, is anyone listening? Phoebe Greenwood finds out

programme.title: The internet warriors
programme.desc: Who are the people that get so angry online? Meet the internet warriors, in their own homes.

programme.title: Gay, black and HIV positive: America's hidden epidemic
programme.desc: If you are a black, gay man in America, your risk of contracting HIV is one in two. Leah Green travels to Atlanta, Georgia, which has the largest gay and black community in the country. She finds out how stigma, education and structural racism continue to feed into this startling statistic

programme.title: Can women save sumo? The crossroads facing Japan's national sport
programme.desc: The ancient Japanese sport of sumo is in well-documented crisis. Years of controversy and scandal have hurt the sport's ability to attract new talent. But new energy is brewing in Tokyo's Ryōgoku district, where the sport is slowly adapting to life in the 21st century, and where - despite being banned from the professional ring itself - women are flocking to watch it like never before. Will it be enough to save Japan's national sport in the 21st century?

programme.title: Somali Night Fever
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s Mogadishu's airwaves were filled with Somali funk, disco, soul and reggae. Musicians rocking afros and bell-bottom trousers would perform at the city's trendiest nightclubs during the height of the country's golden era of music. But it was short-lived: a brutal civil war began, musicians fled to all corners of the world and the vibrant music scene came to an end.

programme.title: Born in Damascus: the legacy of Syria's war for two separated cousins
programme.desc: Laura, a Scottish-Syrian film-maker, reconnects online with her closest cousin Lujain after 10 years apart. Their paths were separated by war, and now Laura hopes to reconstruct a positive image of the past by sharing memories and family videos with Lujain, who fled to Canada. Lujain has no memories of Syria and, suffering from the trauma of war, has forgotten many of their times together. As they reconnect, they begin to rebuild their friendship and reflect on how war continues to affect every relationship long after it ends.

programme.title: The Fight
programme.desc: People with disabilities are among the most discriminated against in Bolivia. Fed up with being ignored, a group of them march across the Andes to the seat of the government in La Paz, asking to speak to President Evo Morales. They are met with riot police, barricades, teargas and water cannon.

programme.desc: Its the final day and the hosts gather to find out how much they've been paid, and which B&B wins the prize

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay announces that Nick, Michelle, and Benjamin must design and cook a five-course menu. And after tasting them, he announces that all three finalists will move forward. As a prize, the final three go to Calamigos Ranch for an awards show. However, Chef Ramsay reveals that it is actually their final challenge and they must cook their menus again.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Michelle and Benjamin compete to be the winner of the first ever Hell's Kitchen all-stars, and the head chef at Gordon Ramsay's Hell's Kitchen Restaurant at Caesar's Palace in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Mother of the Bride
programme.desc: Dress shopping becomes a “relative” headache when mom brings her nearest and dearest along. Mom Anna tries on an exhaustive selection of dresses to please picky bride Lynn. Shy Anna wants to dress discreetly, leaving dress consultant Margaret stuck between a modest mom and a fussy family. Mom Gwen wants a dress that ropes in her rancher husband and costs less than the price of one cow. Can dress expert Terrie find a fancy frock for a country queen? The right fashion choice would even make a cowboy cry.

programme.title: Mother of the Bride
programme.desc: Dress shopping brings out everyone's true colours. Mother of the Bride Janet is known for bad fashion choices and shows up in a psychedelic tie-dyed T shirt. Bride Solange hopes the dress experts at T Carolyn can save her mom, and her wedding, from a pending fashion disaster. But Janet is stuck on wearing a pant suit. Mom Voula wants to tone it down for her son's big fat Greek wedding wearing a long gown, but her bossy best friend Kathy is strident about Voula wearing a sexy short dress. Can dress consultant Terrie find a middle ground before this fashion fable turns into a Greek tragedy?

programme.title: Mother of the Bride
programme.desc: When life throws you a curve ball, finding the right dress can put you over the edge. Mother of the Bride Brenda is forced to scale back her budget because bride Hilary has announced there's a baby on the way… BEFORE the wedding. Brenda still wants bling on a budget but her three daughters say “not so much”. Bride Samara is mortified by her mother Kari's bargain basement style and pleads with dress specialist Terrie to make her mom look like a million bucks. But when she doesn't get the results she wants, she won't stop at anything even if it means picking the dress herself.

programme.title: Mother of the Bride
programme.desc: When shopping for a mother of the bride dress, a daughter's opinion counts. Patty the Pastor wants a dress to impress the masses but seeks her daughters blessings first. But bride Mandy and her bossy sister can't agree on how mom should look. Bride Brittany wants her mom Stefanie to look Maui Wowie on her Hawaiian beach wedding. But will the realities of Stefanie's illness cause a tropical depression instead of sea-breezey splendor?

programme.title: Shake My Beauty
programme.desc: Leo is one of three children with albinism born to black parents, and he celebrates his difference by helping others with the condition to accept themselves. After spending her teens suffering with body dysmorphia, Danica has found happiness being curvy, and is even trying out for a plus size modelling contest. Body positivity activist Michelle has embraced the scars gained from childhood operations and wants to spread the message that everyone should love themselves whatever they look like.

programme.title: Shake My Beauty
programme.desc: Chael has always loved to dance, but as she gained weight she became uncomfortable doing it in public and dancing became confined to the privacy of her bedroom. About 6 years ago, she was on a diet and exercise regime to lose weight, but the headaches she was experiencing turned out to be a brain tumour. While this was successfully operated on, during her recovery Chael gained back all the weight she had lost and also lost all motivation to lose weight.

programme.title: Shake My Beauty
programme.desc: 35-year-old Abigail has had a scar on her torso and under her arm from an accident with boiling water when she was 2 years old. After years of hiding her body, she's hoping that getting a tattoo on the scar will help her to love her body again and feel more confident. Mariah's face is almost totally white from vitiligo, but after covering up with expensive makeup for years, she finally decided to attend her dance group bare-faced - and has never looked back.

programme.title: Shake My Beauty
programme.desc: Jade has vitiligo, a condition where the skin loses pigment, causing different coloured patches. She has always covered her condition with clothes and makeup and has never had the confidence to go out makeup free in public. Jade wants to be a positive role model for her 3 year old daughter, so now she wants to overcome her fears and find the courage to attend a dance class with her natural skin on show. But when push comes to shove, will she go through with it?

programme.title: World Heritage Cyprus
programme.desc: In the heritage lanes of the mediterranean island, buried in the depths of time, are the archaeological sites of Cyprus. Be it Khirokitia, one of the most significant Neolithic settlements of Cyprus, Paphos, a mysterious city with Greek influences, or the vibrant splashes in the churches constructed during the Byzantine rule - Cyprus is rich in its heritage.

programme.title: Best From The Rest Maltese Experiences
programme.desc: Malta is not just about sun drenched islands, but a showcase of some of the finest sights that the Mediterranean has to offer. From the calm waters of Blue Lagoon in Comino to the 4000 year old silent monuments of Mdina and from Birgu's architecture to the artwork of St John's Co-Cathedral. We give you five reasons to visit the European paradise.

programme.title: Landmarks Ha Long Bay, Vietnam
programme.desc: Made up of about 1600 islands and islets huddled together in a lush corner of the Tonkin Bay, off Vietnam's north-east coast, Ha Long Bay is not only a UNESCO World Heritage site, but also central to the mythical and political idea of Vietnam.

programme.title: City Breaks Budapest 2, Hungary
programme.desc: A city with one of the most spectacular skyline, with its cityscape dotted with baroque and neoclassical construction. Join in, as Sabrina tours Budapest, showcasing its food, history and art.

programme.title: Kissed by the Sea Mauritius 2
programme.desc: Join Sakshi as she zooms through the world's third longest zip-line and uncover the beauty of the underwater life in a submarine. Scoop in some history with a visit to Port Louis and Apravasi ghat and conclude with a peek into the diverse wildlife at Vanilla Crocodile Park.

programme.title: Backpack Lisbon, Portugal
programme.desc: Join Driek on his backpacking journey in Lisbon where he enjoys a vintage tram ride, explores Belem tower and Portas Do Sol, understands the local culture and visits the oldest cafe of the country.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun Montreal, Canada
programme.desc: Alex Drobin experiences the North American energy and European charm of Montreal as he explores all that the city has to offer.

programme.title: Off The Grid Loango National Park, Gabon
programme.desc: Step into the wilds of Loango where you'll see unique lowland gorillas, elephants and wild buffaloes blissfully strolling in their natural habitats. Emeline takes an off the grid tour to the panoramic Gabon where she learns a lot about animal behaviour and their communication signs. Venturing onto the picturesque forested wraps and camping under the open sky will truly give you goosebumps.

programme.title: Boarding Pass Helsinki, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi visits the colourful, clean seaside city of Helsinki, the capital of Finland where she explores iconic attractions, fortresses, churches and libraries. And later she enjoys a Finnish Sauna.

programme.title: Backpack Sintra, Portugal
programme.desc: Driek travels to Sintra that's known for its castles and palaces. He explores Pena Palace and Castelo dos Mouros and continues travelling to the historic town Obidos and enjoys the famous drink, Ginja

programme.title: Food Fact Fun Quebec, Canada

programme.desc: Get ready to take on exciting wildlife adventures of Monte De Crystal with Emeline. The national park enveloped by misty clouds adds an ethereal feeling to nature's canvas. Ancient rainforest, incredibly diverse flora and fauna make it a must visit for an off the grid traveller. Besides the happy sounds of the wilds, the thunderous roars of waterfalls also make sure that you get up and close with nature in Gabon

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Cozy up to three sweet rescues vying for the love of a family's youngest child.

programme.title: Bondi Vet

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Meet a rare iguana and see three baby koalas get microchipped.

programme.title: Bondi Vet

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife

programme.title: Sweden's Royal Palace
programme.desc: The King and his sister, Princess Christina, share their childhood memories of the palace. "It wasn't really a nice environment to live in, it was more like a hotel," the King recalls as he describes the rooms where he and his sisters grew up in the south wing of the palace. Crown Princess Victoria shows us priceless objects in her favorite rooms "It's a fantastic cultural heritage and it's impressive that these rooms are preserved, considering how old they are. It's an extraordinary and accessible treasure that belongs to all of us," she says. Viewers also have the opportunity to go behind the scenes before a state visit, hear stories of real ghosts, as well as historians, experts and craftsmen who offer a unique portrait of a national treasure: our Royal Palace.

programme.title: Sweden's Royal Palace
programme.desc: We climb scaffolding to find out more about the facade renovation and get to the bottom of the question of whether the old castle is haunted. Follow us through the gilded halls and dark vaults of the cellars. The Royal Palace in Stockholm has over a thousand rooms and hundreds of years of royal history. The King and his sister, Princess Christina, tell us what it was like to grow up in the palace. Princess Victoria shows priceless objects.

programme.title: Harry: The Mysterious Prince

programme.title: Prince Charles And Prince William
programme.desc: How have Charles and William stayed so visibly fond of each other?

programme.title: The Life Of Queen Elizabeth II

programme.title: Queen Louise
programme.desc: Known as the Queen of Hearts during her lifetime, Louise of Prussia had no official political or military power. However, she wielded influence over the men who did-predominantly her husband, King Frederick Wilhelm III-and she had the stature and style to become a symbolic figure.

programme.title: Prince Charles

programme.title: Only One Can Remain
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.” On the island, Lloyd learns his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen. They meet the playfully deceitful ruler who tells them they are in a tournament where ‘Only one can remain'. When they are spoiled by their posh quarters, they are surprised to find the game is already afoot: Last person to find a Jade Blade is out. After an epic battle of elemental powers, Kai steals the last one from Karlof, who is kicked out of the tournament through a trap door leading to the unknown. Later that night, the Ninja go in search for Zane but come across an underground temple where Chen and his Anacondrai Worshippers steal Karlof's power. Is this a fighting tournament, or a ploy to steal everyone's power?

programme.title: Versus
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. In order to find Zane and get to the bottom of Chen's mysterious plot the Ninja need to stay in the tournament and get past the first round. Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. Meanwhile, new Titanium Ninja Zane is locked in a dungeon and has a nightmare about a ferocious Ice Dragon. Guided by the voice of Pixal, he embraces his new technology and escapes his cell, only to find Pixal hasn't fared as well. Though she has no body, he inputs her CPU into his, uniting the two. In an attempt to prevent Jay versus Cole, the Ninja enlist the Master of Mind to help, but are unable to prevent the inevitable. In a gladiator battle, Jay and Cole put aside their feud to throw the match --enraging Chen to send Cole down the mysterious trap door. Lastly, Nya sees Zane's beacon is working again and is on the hunt for them.

programme.title: Winds Of Change
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only to discover it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. After the Ninja save a small fishing village, Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain but Kai promises to watch over him. When Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm,Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. When the Ninja's powers mysteriously disappear, they return to the Tea Farm and are attacked by Lloyd, who is possessed by the spirit of Moro, the Master of Wind! After a harrowing escape on the Bounty, Wu tells the Ninja they weren't his first pupils!

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja – and the Ninja discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, leaving them to crash. When the dust settles, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja. They discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. In order to save Lloyd and get their powers back, they set off to find the first clue – the scroll to the lost martial art of ‘Airjitzu'. On their way to get it, they have a run in with one of Moro's ghost generals Wraythe, and discover water is the key to stopping them. Meanwhile, Nya discovers a family secret – her mother was a Water Ninja and with training, she could be one too.

programme.title: The Grateful Dud
programme.desc: At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a teen bulldozer named Fiona. But when Fiona's pushy, over-the-top appreciation makes Mia's life a living nightmare, the Friends must Ride To The Rescue! At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a brassy teen bulldozer named Fiona. Although Fiona means well, her pushy, over-the-top appreciation soon makes Mia's life a living nightmare: embarrassing Mia at school, scaring away her boyfriend, and causing major havoc at the Country Club. The Friends must find a way for Mia to escape Fiona's nonstop gratitude and foil Tanya's sneaky schemes to get Mia kicked out of the club. And when a crisis erupts at the club's Fall Ball and Horse Show, all the Friends have to do some fancy riding to help their BFF save the day.

programme.title: Missing Fruit
programme.desc: Whenever Mia has been at Maya's green grocery, something is missing. Apart from this, a very famous scientist comes to the annual winter fair bringing a penguin. The girls are so excited when they get to visit the penguin, at least until it goes missing and it might be their fault.

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Karoake and Music Special
programme.desc: LEGO Friends are having fun with Karaoke and music.

programme.title: The Worthy Dreamer
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers arrive at Castle Nocturnia hoping to find the key to defeating the Nightmare King, but the castle won't reveal its secrets easily.

programme.title: The Light Of Nocturnia
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to crack the code to reveal Lunia's secrets while the Nightmare King presses a full-scale assault on Castle Nocturnia.

programme.title: Night Hunted
programme.desc: The Nightmare King begins to open a rift to the Waking World while Mateo presses Oz for the truth about Lunia's battle with the Nightmare King.

programme.title: The Rift
programme.desc: A night terror is on the hunt at the fall festival and so is the Night Hunter, who appears in the Waking World with a brand-new threat for Mateo.

programme.title: Enter The Nightmare
programme.desc: The barrier to the Waking World has been torn and the Nightmare King invades Brooklyn, where the Dream Chasers must make their final stand!

programme.title: Beasts And Dragons, Rise Of Garmadon
programme.desc: Zane, Jay, and Kai remember some of Ninjago's fearsome creatures so that Cole defend the cave from an unidentified monster. But Ninja confront memories of their greatest villain and ally, Garmadon, before the threat to Zane controls him completely.

programme.title: Knight Out
programme.desc: When the other NEXO-Knights decide they need a vacation from Clay, they send him on a holiday not knowing that he's going to a resort that houses an evil book or that Jestro will be heading there, too. Clay needs a vacation. Or, actually, the knights need a vacation from Clay! Clay is so super-focused that sometimes they just can't take it: training, training, maintenance, the Knights' Code tests then…more training. Even Merlok 2.0 is exhausted and he has no physical form! So, the Knights send Clay off on a holiday against his will (arranged by Lance because if there's one thing he can do it's plan a vacation.) But unbeknownst to the other Knights, Jestro and the Book of Monsters are tracking an evil book. A book that they suspect is located near the resort “Exalted Towers” renowned for its exquisite service, where Clay is staying. It's the BOOK OF CRUELTY and Clay notices that it's affecting the “high class” resort where Lance has booked him: the service is terrible, the staff is nasty, and everyone seems to take joy in being cruel to him (and to each other.) Meanwhile, the other Knights are having a terrible time because they realize that Clay takes charge of the basic maintenance of almost everything in the Fortrex. Stuff starts breaking down, chores are not getting done and everyone is getting on each other's nerves. Clay senses things are “off” at the resort, and discovers the book they've been using as the guest register is really the Book of Cruelty. As Clay scoops it up, he looks outside to see…Jestro and his monsters arrive on the Evilmobile. Clay battles as best he can on his own by setting traps and being cunning but he's finally caught. Just when it looks like this will be the cruelest vacation ever the other Knights arrive on their vehicles! They spring into action, free Clay, and battle and defeat Jestro and the monsters – though Jestro escapes. The Knights make Clay promise to never go on vacation again.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of “snotty” monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham – one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a “snotheiser” ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters … some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath…he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two…it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power “Glorious Griffon” but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: Open Mike Knight
programme.desc: The Book of Betrayal leads Jestro and his Monsters to Funnyton – the funnies town in the kingdom. When they Knights arrive to capture him, they discover (to their shock) that Jestro and the Book of Monsters are now the town's top comedians! Jestro and his monsters are in attack formation moving to pillage the town of Funnyton. But when they arrive, ready to tear into the place, they see that nobody's in town. Then, they hear…laughter?! The entire town is there listening to a stand-up comic JOKES KNIGHTLY. He's hilarious. He commands such power, such attention, and such loyalty. Jestro and the BOM decide they must become funny. They order all kinds of book on comedy from Spamazon: books on parody, irony, insult humor, slapstick, satire, knock-knock jokes, elephant jokes, “my monster is so fat” jokes, etc. They work-up a ventriloquist act with the BOM sitting on Jestro's lap. They start doing their act and, surprisingly, they're funny. They're very funny. The Fortrex arrives and the knights rush out, ready for battle. They fight through a string of monsters just outside the town, but discover they're only working as “bouncers” to keep too many people out of the comedy club. (“Sorry, you guys aren't on the list.”) The knights hear loud laughs and head there. In the club, they discover the town isn't being held hostage, they're in the show voluntarily having a great time. And…Jestro and the BOM are funny. Meanwhile, during the show, Jokes Knightly decides he'll steal the BOM and Jestro's act. During the intermission at the comedy show, Clay comes backstage to talk to Jestro. Maybe, Clay says, this shows that Jestro doesn't have to be bad…he is funny, like Clay always said he was. Meanwhile, Jokes Knightly steals the BOM and Jestro can't find it. He panics. Clay encourages him…go on stage alone, be funny…he can do it! Jestro goes out and is funny on his own he hits all his punchlines, he gets big laughs he starts to see that Clay is right. The BOM sees that Jokes Knightly has a “joke book” that turns out to be the BOOK OF BETRAYAL. That's how Mike Knight has become so funny – by stealing everyone's material! BOM calls in Magmar, who saves him from Mike Knight AND takes the Book of Betrayal. As Jestro comes off-stage to great applause, the BOM tells him they have the Book of Betrayal. The BOM calls in Magmar and his monsters and they start a fight as Clay comes to Jestro's defense and calls on the other Knights for backup. A big battle ensues that destroys the comedy club in Funnyton. The Knights win and drive-off Magmar, the monsters and the BOM. As they retreat, the BOM looks around: “Where's my Jestro?!” Jestro sneaked away during the fight and is in a nearby forest with…the Book of Betrayal.

programme.title: Monster Smurfs
programme.desc: This is spook-a-Smurf eve, and all the Smurfs get ready for the fancy dress party… But Brainy Smurf gets hold of Papa Smurf's Book of Magic, and all the Smurfs are changed into hideous but funny creatures. Yet danger lurks...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hefty's Rival: Oh, the sad plight of Hefty Smurf! He used to be the strongest and the best trained of all the Smurfs. But since Wild Smurf arrived in the Village, nobody pays attention to Hefty anymore. What can Papa Smurf do?

programme.title: The Trojan Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel, the evil wizard, has devised a new plan to capture the Smurfs: he builds a giant statue in the shape of Papa Smurf. Thus, he hopes, the Smurfs are going to drag the statue into their Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Soup A La Smurf: A terrible giant called Bigmouth helps Gargamel hunt the Smurfs so he can feast on Soup a la Smurf. Papa Smurf tricks the big monster and then convinces him that Soup a la Gargamel is a far more appetizing dish than smurfy soup.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's First Christmas: The wonderful joy of Christmas for Baby Smurf and everyone else is almost ruined by the evil Chlorhydris who puts a spell on Mr. Nicholas to stop him from spreading holiday cheer. Fortunately, Papa Smurf and his little blue creatures break the spell and Christmas spreads over the land once more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette Unmade: Gargamel feels that creating the Smurfette was the worst mistake of his life. Now, if he could change her back to her original nasty self, he would get all the Smurfs in one fell swoop… Will Smurfette revert to her evil ways?

programme.title: Monster Smurfs
programme.desc: This is spook-a-Smurf eve, and all the Smurfs get ready for the fancy dress party… But Brainy Smurf gets hold of Papa Smurf's Book of Magic, and all the Smurfs are changed into hideous but funny creatures. Yet danger lurks...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Chip Off The Old Smurf: Disaster strikes when Brainy and Baby mix up Papa Smurf's formulas, leaving them powerless before an army of hungry locusts unleashed on the forest by Gargamel.

programme.title: The Kaplowey Scroll
programme.desc: There is a terrifying magic word. When you direct the word at something or someone, you make it vanish into nothingness! Can the Smurfs undo its evil power before Gargamel gets hold of it?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Lost City Of Yore: Curiosity brings Nosey Smurf to the lair of the Hag Sisters, who want to find the terrifying Sceptre of Yore... And Gargamel wants to cheat the two witches as he tries to destroy the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it… And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Master Smurf: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette For A Day: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - One Good Smurf Deserves Another: Handy Smurf has saved Clumsy from a horrible fate. Clumsy swears eternal devotion to his savior and does his best to repay his debt… With awkward results. A clever scheme is needed to stop Clumsy's well-meant catastrophes...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hogapatra's Beauty Sleep: Hogapatra, the hideous, bloated, vulgar Queen of the Nile, cannot get to sleep and this causes huge bags under her eyes. Her beauty recipe requires squeezing sleep from Lazy Smurf...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Fuzzle Trouble: Clumsy brings a Fuzzle back to the Smurf village where the tiny, loveable creature multiplies and threatens to eat the new dam. Harmony plays his music and the entranced Fuzzles march back into the woods where they attach themselves to an unsuspecting Gargamel.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Bubble, Bubble, Smurfs In Trouble: Each morning, dew is deposited by water sprites on forest leaves. Wait till you see what happens when Scaredy Smurf gets hold of the dew-making magic wand...

programme.title: Humpty Dumpty
programme.desc: The Teletubbies join in with the game when a voice trumpet sings Humpty Dumpty. The magic windmill brings a musical transmission featuring King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys. Po has a falling down day. The Teletubbies count up to one and make up a falling down dance.

programme.title: Going on a Train
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love to play slide games. They stop when it is time to watch some children go on a train journey. Po loves to ride her scooter, but one day it rolls away and Po chases it all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Going to School by Boat
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch how some children who live on an island go to school by boat. A voice trumpet appears in Teletubbyland and the Teletubbies play a game called here and there.

programme.title: Good Morning
programme.desc: The Teletubbies finish up their toast in time to see Alex Pascall and some children go for a walk and sing Good Morning to everyone they meet. All the Teletubbies wanted to play with Dipsy, but Dipsy wants to dance.

programme.title: Gospel Singing
programme.desc: All the Teletubbies pop up to say hello. The Teletubbies see a girl whose mother is a very good singer. Four happy Teletubbies dance around Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Grand Old Duke of York
programme.desc: The Teletubbies join in with the game when a voice trumpet sings the Grand Old Duke of York. The magic windmill brings a musical transmission featuring King Pleasure and The Biscuit Boys. And when Po plays a special drum, something magic happens in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Guessing Game
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children have fun playing a guessing game. A book appears in Teletubbyland and Laa-Laa loves to count the rabbits.

programme.title: Gymnastics
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun creeping round the column in Home Hill before watching some children doing gymnastics. Laa-Laa plays catch ball indoors with the other Teletubbies, but the Noo-Noo catches the ball first.

programme.title: Haymaking
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say hello. The Teletubbies watch some children making hay. A tree appears in Teletubbyland and the Noo-Noo tidies up all the Teletubbies favourite things.

programme.title: Herding Sheep
programme.desc: Some voice trumpets rise to wish the Tubbies good morning. The Teletubbies watch some children herding sheep. The Teletubbies go in and out, and up and down, round the corner and along to top until it is time for Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Hey Diddle Diddle
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for Dipsy and Laa-Laa which makes them laugh and run away. The Teletubbies watch some children dancing with King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys.

programme.title: Hickory Dickory Dock

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.sub-title: Season 1 - Prison-sickness | Goofy Golf | Big and Not Bright
programme.desc: The Daltons escape at last. As soon as they're outside, they break out in pimples, and have trouble breathing. They meet Fabulous Falcon who diagnoses this peculiar affliction: “ prison-sickness ”. The only effective remedy is to go home to the penitentiary. And indeed, the Daltons recover as soon as they're back. So they're going to have to take whatever it is they MISS with them when they get outside. And what if that happened to be… the thrill of escape?

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.sub-title: Season 1 - Last Will | Signed, Stamped and delivered… | The Dalton Code
programme.desc: Miss Betty affirms that reading is thr best way to freedom, so Joe devours every book he can lay hands on in the prison library. However many books the Daltons read… nothing happens. They're still locked up. Then Joe stumbles on the “ The Count of Monte-Cristo ” - it's a revelation! They just have to PRETEND to die, like Edmond Dantes! But acting dead is harder than it seems…

programme.title: Telmo And Tula, Little Cooks
programme.desc: Doughnut | Vanilla Custards | Popsicles | Cell Phone shaped Sandwiches Telmo & Tula is a very fun animated series in which children learn to cook the best breakfasts, sandwiches, salads and desserts in a safe and entertaining way. Telmo and Tula will teach children how fun it is to prepare delicious meals step by step.

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.sub-title: Season 1 - Camera Scam | The Daltons go baking | The Dalton Rodeo
programme.desc: When a film crew visits the penitentiary, the Daltons seize the chance to act as stars … and take off. But of course, everything in movies is just an illusion… including escape attempts!

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.sub-title: Season 1 - The Daltons' Christmas | The Daltons go Snow-crazy | Totem Pole Daltons
programme.desc: The Daltons build a chimney and fireplace for Santa Claus… with the hidden ambition of escaping through the conduit! Unfortunately, a few inmates hold a grudge against Santa and they're eager to get even with him for once and all…

programme.title: Rocket Jo
programme.desc: From episode 1 to 17 In the city of Ultrapolis, informed by his fellow pigeons, Randolf is fighting swindlers and crime. He transforms into a mysterious, comical and lovable hero named Pigeon Boy. He may be more Charlie Chaplin than Batman or Superman but he does his best to catch criminal…

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.sub-title: What a Ball! | Penitentiary Palace Hotel | get jabbed
programme.desc: A ball and chain salesman is promoting a revolutionary model at the Penitentiary: if a prisoner with the ball tries to escape, a series of mechanisms goes off to stop him! An old ball and chain won't stop the Daltons! Well, not so old after all…

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.sub-title: Season 1 - Trompe-l'œil | UFO goofs | The Prophecy
programme.desc: Joe wake up one morning to see a delicatessen right in front of him in their cell! Averell chuckles- it's not real! He just painted it!! Joe leaps out of bed and dashes over to test the wall: it's true! It's a trompe-l'œil! This immediately provides him with a new scheme for escape: Averell paints over the penitentiary door as a wall, and paints a door on the wall… which means the guards will be looking the wrong way when they pick the lock and escape ! Get it? Errrr…

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.sub-title: Season 1 - The Secret Passage | Zzzzzzzzz… | Sleepwalkers Escape
programme.desc: Joe has a dream about escaping with his brothers via a secret passage in the penitentiary. And the very next day, Miss Betty talks about the legend of the secret passage – one that would have been built by the penitentiary's first director. Joe can't remember how they got into it in his dream. So he has to dream it all over again, so that they can find the spot. Easier said than done…

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.sub-title: Wanted: Four Cute Boys | take Royal Leave | The Voice of Freedom
programme.desc: A fashion designer is hired by the government to give prison uniforms a new look. Joe finds out that four models will be selected from the inmates to present the collection across the country: that's a great way to make a great escape! Or not…

programme.title: Boom & Reds
programme.desc: From episode 61 to 66 The Reds are tiny creatures who are part of a community that lives together in a tree belonging to a fantastic world. The Reds love to gather and draw pictures and in each chapter, the ogre Boom has to guess what the Reds are drawing on the ground.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.desc: Ella is enjoying watching a caterpillar eating an apple on a tree but after she returns with a flower for it to nibble, she discovers her little friend has gone! Bee points to the cocoon hanging from a leaf. Ella and Bee watch in wonder as the cocoon opens and a beautiful butterfly emerges! / In this mindful video, Rishi's Mum holds a yoga class at the farm. She teaches three positions to Ella, Rishi, Pablo and Lettie. They learn the Downward Facing Dog, Warrior Three and The Butterfly. The students are all naturals - well, all except Lettie. It appears sheep are not very good at yoga! / It's a hot day so Woolly Sheep sets up an ice cream stall outside Lellobee City Farm. Ella, Rishi, Lettie and Carlos bring Woolly fresh apples, oranges, bananas and cherries from the farm so Woolly can make them delicious and refreshing fruity ice cream. / Ella, Mama Duck and the five little ducklings are having a game of Hide and Seek. The ducklings hide all around the farm - on Heidi's hat, in the vegetable patch, on a hay bail, on Carlo's guitar and among some flowers. Will Ella and Mama Duck be able to find them?

programme.title: Orange Moo-Cow: The No Rules Day / The Old Oak
programme.desc: Zoh got a letter of appreciation at school for her exemplary behavior, so now she teaches everyone about what's right and what's wrong: what's the right way to behave, what's the right way to dance and even what's the right way to play. But actually all the kids got tired of strict rules and limitations after a school semestre they just did, so they want to play a bit without any kind of rules. The parents let their kids be mischievous, and that's when Zoh gets to be her best – she's the biggest expert in rules, so she comes up with the best ways to be mischievous too. / After a thunderstorm an oak by the road fell. The kids feel sorry for the oak, Mr Khariton does too, but he explains to the kids, that it's just that the time has come – the oak was already old. Mr Khariton walks off, and the kids start pondering, Mr Khariton is not young either – what if his time is up too?

programme.title: Bending the Rules
programme.desc: Theo Gold, the NewOrleans Assistant District Attorney, is about to have the worst day of his life. Not only does his wife decide to leave him on the eve of his birthday, but he manages to lose a high-profile case against Harry Blades (WWE Superstar Edge), an eccentric yet hardnosed detective on trial for corruption. Now, the only thing Theo has left is the car his father entrusted to him – a 1956 Studebaker Goldenhawk. But when he discovers his father's ‘pride and joy' has been stolen, Theo is determined to do whatever it takes to get that car back.

programme.title: Cecil
programme.desc: Cecil's name reveals his lisp so he changes it to “Michael Jordan.” His school learns a lesson about acceptance after he and his friends start a business that sells celebrity names to kids.

programme.title: Switched
programme.desc: Tired of being bullied, Cassandra Evans prays that her nemesis, Katie Sharp, the queen bee of social media, would know what it's like to walk a day in her shoes. Her prayer is answered in an unexpected way when they get "Switched."

programme.title: Golden Years
programme.desc: When Arthur and Martha Goode find that their pension pot is virtually worthless they decide to take drastic action - by robbing a bank! After their first robbery is successful they start to like the criminal lifestyle and so decide to rob even more, but as the banks get bigger and the robberies get riskier will they be able to outwit the police as they close in? In the vein of "Lady In the Van" and "The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel", Golden Years is a hilarious British heist thriller that shows just because you're getting old doesn't mean you have to stop having fun.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Change Of Heart
programme.desc: Diane McCarthy produces a TV show for her arrogant ex-boyfriend, Jared. Diane would love to quit to focus on her successful blog but she can't afford to.

programme.title: Mr. Fiction
programme.desc: A bookstore owner and hopeless romantic meets the man of her dreams and tries to save her business with the help of a business consultant.

programme.title: Dog Gone
programme.desc: A courageous boy battles a gang of bumbling thieves to rescue a dog carrying a fortune in stolen diamonds.

programme.title: Closer To God Jessicas Journey
programme.desc: A mother struggles to keep things under control as her daughter dies of cancer, her estranged father suddenly returns, and her faith in God is put to the test.

programme.title: Mr. Right
programme.desc: Charlotte's taking her chance in the big city. She just began working for the hottest romance site writing their hit weekly dating article, and her new best friend, Lila, is as fun as she is loyal. She also befriends a coffee barista, Liam, who shows her all the best spots in the city. But dating a new guy each week to write about is making her feel burned out. And when Liam develops feelings for her, Charlotte will need to decide whether her work is more important than her chance at love.

programme.title: Letters To God
programme.desc: Tyler Doherty is an extraordinary eight-year-old boy. Surrounded by a loving family and community, and armed with the courage of his faith, he faces his daily battle against cancer with bravery and grace. To Tyler, God is a friend, a teacher and the ultimate pen pal-Tyler's prayers take the form of letters, which he composes and mails on a daily basis. The letters find their way into the hands of Brady McDaniels, a beleaguered postman standing at a crossroads in his life. At first, he is confused and conflicted over what to do with the letters. But the decision he ultimately makes becomes a testament to the quiet power of one boy's shining spirit and unshakable faith.

programme.title: Farm To Fork To Love
programme.desc: A young and talented chef, ALICE (Meggan Kaiser), works as a sous chef at one of the top restaurants in New York. After a disastrous night serving a food critic, she receives an invitation to judge a food competition in honor of the prestigious annual fundraiser for the St. Andrew's Children's Hospital. Alice accepts the invitation despite the dismay of BRETT, her boss who is also her boyfriend. Once she gets to Kansas, Alice is surprised to find her former boyfriend in college, CHRISTIAN (Scot cooper), is amongst the judges. The cooking show and her reconnection with Christian will make Alice reconsider her calling and make her dreams come true.

programme.title: My One True Love
programme.desc: When 2 of the 3 things a fortune teller predicts come true, Ali wonders about the 3rd - finding true love with a man named John. Drawn to a fireman whose name isn't John, does she trust destiny or her heart?

programme.title: From The Heart
programme.desc: Kathy Yoder has left her Amish ways and is a successful travel guide writer. When Kathy goes home to settle her dad's affairs, she's reminded of her life before she left the Amish community, including her old love, Isaac. Will Kathy decide to stay or return to her traveling lifestyle?

programme.title: White Feather
programme.desc: In 1877 Wyoming, during the peace negotiations between the Cheyenne and the USA, an Indian girl falls in-love with a land surveyor, causing the ire of her Cheyenne fiance.

programme.title: More Dollars for the MacGregors
programme.desc: Forsythe, who uses his wife as bait, has gained a reputation as a gunslinger.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill

programme.title: Alien Thunder
programme.desc: Based on an actual event, this is the tragic story of Saskatchewan fugitive Almighty Voice (Gordon Tootoosis), a Cree Indian who is arrested for stealing government livestock out of desperate hunger.

programme.title: Town Tamer
programme.desc: A gunfighter is hired to clean up a wild frontier town, but there are forces afoot who want to keep the town as wide-open as it is.

programme.title: A Random Encounter

programme.title: Onegin
programme.desc: Eugene Onegin is a jaded and disaffected young man who leaves St. Petersburg unexpectedly when he inherits an estate from a wealthy uncle. Starring: Ralph Fiennes, Liv Tyler, Toby Stephens, Lena Headey, Simon McBurney, Jason Watkins

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: Cinderella Pact
programme.desc: Nola, Deb, and Nancy are best friends who create a Cinderella Pact—a weight loss agreement using advice from "fairy godmother" newspaper columnist Bel.

programme.title: Eat, Drink and Be Married
programme.desc: Jess and Max are ready to call off their wedding due to the overwhelming stress over how out-of-control the planning and everything has become. At their wit's end, they go to see Billie, a beautiful ‘always a bridesmaid' kind-hearted soul who has a non-profit devoted to donating the components of already-paid-for, yet dismantled weddings, to the underserved and people with special needs. However, Max's brother Charlie will stop at nothing to keep Jess and Max together and enlists the help of Billie by enticing her with extra help for her business.

programme.title: Murder at the Mansion
programme.desc: Deanna and her fiancé Karl travel to his family's estate where they plan to be married. But someone in Karl's family is determined to stop the marriage in the simplest way possible: by killing the bride! A.K.A. Engaged to a Pyscho

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: Jumanji meets The Mummy in this edge-of-your-seat action thriller, starring Kelsey Grammer (X-Men), Kellan Lutz (Twilight) and Bingbing Li (Transformers). In a quest to find a lost colleague, a team of scientists find themselves deep underground in an ancient labyrinth, battling Chinese magic and flesh-eating spiders, while trying to unearth a secret that has been buried for centuries.

programme.title: Casuals: The Story of the Legendary Terrace Fashion
programme.desc: As the 1980s began in Britain, under the radar the 'casual' had already arrived. The film includes recently-unearthed archive footage and gives insightful interviews with personalities like Peter Hooton, who were at the heart of the story at a time when football and fashion mattered more than corporate hospitality and sanitized stadiums.

programme.title: Iron Men
programme.desc: Behind the scenes and with the fans of West Ham United as they move to a new home after 112 years at Upton Park.

programme.title: Bella Vista
programme.desc: A film about place and belonging.

programme.title: DOMESTIC
programme.desc: Domestic is a story about people who eat the animals they love and animals who love people unconditionally. A rabbit, a hen, a cat, a dog and a dove pass through the lives of the main characters and influence their evolution.

programme.title: A Farewell to Arms
programme.desc: An American ambulance driver and an English nurse fall in love in Italy during World War I.

programme.title: A Propos De Nice
programme.desc: What starts off as a conventional travelogue turns into a satirical portrait of the town of Nice on the French Cote d'Azur, especially its wealthy inhabitants.

programme.title: Born To Be Wild (AKA Pride of the West)
programme.desc: A greedy land baron has shut down the dam that supplies water to the town of Indian Head. Two truck drivers race to get a truck loaded with dynamite to the dam so they can blow it, but must battle their way through a gang of armed thugs hired by the land baron to stop them.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Chuck Scott gets a job as chauffeur to tough guy Eddie Roman but Chuck's involvement with Eddie's fearful wife becomes a nightmare.

programme.title: Scorched
programme.desc: In this crime caper set in a small deserted town, three mischievous bank employees all plan to rob the bank at the same time but they're unaware of what the others are up to. Starring: Alicia Silverstone, Rachael Leigh Cook, Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Whip It
programme.desc: In Bodeen, Texas, an indie-rock loving misfit finds a way of dealing with her small-town misery after she discovers a roller derby league in nearby Austin.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: In this live-action movie feature, Shredder has returned to cause more mayhem by kidnapping the rat Ninja Master. But the Turtles have been armed with Professor Perry's antidote and, with the help of a journalist, set out to save the Ninja Master.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The classic comedy with cool stars and even cooler cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all-star cast in the ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run.

programme.title: Maria My Love
programme.desc: A young woman named Ana is struggling to deal with her mother's death and her father's mistakes. In an effort to feel better, she reconnects with her half-sister Grace, (Lauren Fales) and, inspired by a new boyfriend (Brian Rieger), sets out on a quest to find someone to help. Though excited and hopeful when she meets an eccentric woman named Maria (Karen Black), she soon discovers Maria is a compulsive hoarder, and is swept up in a situation more emotionally and morally complicated than she had expected to find. Inspired by a true story.

programme.title: Alter
programme.desc: Alter, a psychological thriller about a man who is convinced that he's found his childhood abductor, and is determined to get him to confess by any means necessary.

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: Psychological thriller. A woman tries to help her sister remember the events surrounding the fatal stabbing of their mother.

programme.title: Love Again
programme.desc: A couple on the brink of divorce decides to keep their marital woes secret as they help their daughter plan her wedding. As the two work together on the happy occasion, they soon discover that their own marriage might just be worth saving.

programme.title: 5 Weddings
programme.desc: A journalist writing a story on Punjabi weddings falls in love with her liaison officer who is trying to keep her story censored amidst a colorful mosaic of transgender dancers and cultural clashes.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: Kay and Arnold are a devoted couple, but decades of marriage have left Kay wanting to spice things up and reconnect with her husband. When she hears of a renowned couple's specialist in the small town of Great Hope Springs, she attempts to persuade her skeptical husband, a steadfast man of routine, to get on a plane for a week of marriage therapy. Just convincing the stubborn Arnold to go on the retreat is hard enough – the real challenge for both of them comes as they shed their bedroom hang-ups and try to re-ignite the spark that caused them to fall for each other in the first place.

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Kelly is a young, creative, ambitious events planner in New York City and quickly gaining a reputation as one of the best in the business. But when Joe, a stubborn, difficult, but influential website editor, hires her to organize his niece's 10th birthday party, Kelly quickly realizes that she may have just met her match.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: The Contractor
programme.desc: Elizabeth is remodeling her home and hires a contractor. Soon she learns he'd targeted the family all along.

programme.title: The Next Three Days
programme.desc: A family man finds his world turned upside down when his wife is convicted of murdering her boss.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: Two brothers prepare to go head to head in a mixed martial arts battle in order to win the prize money.

programme.title: Non-Transferable
programme.desc: Pack your bags for a whirlwind adventure across three continents as two strangers find out if love really is transferable! On the eve of a romantic trip-of-a-lifetime, love-struck Amy is dumped by her boyfriend. And reservations are not transferable! Determined not to miss out, Amy trawls the internet for a guy with the same name. This charming, laugh-out-loud take on modern love is a must watch.

programme.title: The Adventures of Maid Marian
programme.desc: Everyone knows the stories of Robin Hood and Maid Marian robbing from the rich to give to the poor, daring escapes from the evil Sheriff, sword fights and adventures. They eventually culminate in the arrival of King Richard the Lionheart who grants the outlaw a royal pardon. Most of the stories end here. This is the story of what happens next. A legend returns to save her people again...

programme.title: Air Force One is Down: Air Force One is Down
programme.desc: [EPISODE 1/2] Alistair Maclean's highly charged novel is brought to life in this tense, international thriller. When a fearless Serbian General is captured and imprisoned for war crimes, his loyal soldiers hijack Air Force One, kidnap the President of the United Stated and demand the release of their General. A hair-raising, high-altitude, wall-to-wall action-adventure.

programme.title: Air Force One is Down: Air Force One is Down
programme.desc: [EPISODE 2/2] Alistair Maclean's highly charged novel is brought to life in this tense, international thriller. When a fearless Serbian General is captured and imprisoned for war crimes, his loyal soldiers hijack Air Force One, kidnap the President of the United Stated and demand the release of their General. A hair-raising, high-altitude, wall-to-wall action-adventure.

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: How far would you go for the one you love? For the MacGregor brothers, that question becomes a life-or-death decision that tests their strength, courage, and sense of family. When Mia, the fiance of Roman MacGregor (Ashton Holmes: Revenge, A History of Violence), is abducted into a human trafficking ring, Roman and brothers Brendan (Shawn Ashmore: X-Men, The Following) and Deklan (Cole Hauser: Rogue,Olympus Has Fallen) decide to save Mia on their own. Theyre guided by Det. Avery (Bruce Willis: Die Hard, The Sixth Sense), the cop on the case whose sense of duty will be pushed to its limits and challenged by his colleague on the case Det. Brooke Baker (Sophia Bush: One Tree Hill, Chicago Fire). As the MacGregors sidestep official boundaries to rescue Mia, every second counts. But are they prepared for the ACTS OF VIOLENCE theyre about to experience?

programme.title: Hacker
programme.desc: A computer hacker must run from a covert group known only as "The Agency"

programme.title: The Many Faces Of Alice
programme.desc: A woman wakes up from a coma with no memory of her previous life. She soon uncovers some unpleasant truth about the woman she once was and must fight for redemption. Starring Anna Lise Phillips (2016)

programme.title: The Killer Trainer
programme.desc: A woman must defend herself after her personal trainer takes their relationship to dangerous levels. Starring Hannah Barefoot (2018)

programme.title: Precious Things
programme.desc: A mother must prove that her daughter is innocent of murder. Starring Victoria Pratt (2017)

programme.title: Hacker
programme.desc: A computer hacker must run from a covert group known only as "The Agency"

programme.title: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: Nikki is an aspiring chef who lands her dream job. After a rocky start, she grows closer to Paul, the head chef. Together, will they create the perfect recipe for love? Brendan Penny stars. (2016)

programme.title: Just The Way You Are
programme.desc: Married couple Jennie and Ian try to bring back the spark in their relationship.

programme.title: A Love Yarn
programme.desc: Samuel heads to New Zealand to help sell his aunt's mill. Yarn shop owner Sophie has a plan that will save the mill, but can she convince Samuel? She soon discovers it's harder than it seems. (2020)

programme.title: Love On A Limb
programme.desc: Aimee is always up for a good cause, so when the town's beloved Oak tree is set to be felled, she takes it upon herself to try and save it. But will her actions ultimately lead to love? (2016)

programme.title: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: Nikki is an aspiring chef who lands her dream job. After a rocky start, she grows closer to Paul, the head chef. Together, will they create the perfect recipe for love? Brendan Penny stars. (2016)

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: Above The Shadows
programme.desc: 'Above the Shadows' is a magic realism tale about a young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible and must find her way back into the world. After more than a decade of solitude and making a living in the shadows as a paparazzi photographer, Holly meets the one man who can see her, Shayne, a down-on-his-luck MMA fighter working as a bouncer. Holly discovers that it was one of her tabloid photographs that caused his downfall and that she must restore him to his former glory if she wants to regain a foothold in the world around her. With Shayne, Holly awakens to love but also to the reality that she bears more responsibility for her fate than she imagined.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III: Turtles in Time
programme.desc: The turtles have defeated their nemesis Shredder and are still forced to hide in the depths of the subway system. April brings them gifts to cheer them up and one of them is a time traveling device which takes the turtles and April back to feudal Japan. The turtles must fight to free the village and find a way home. Starring Elias Koteas ("Gattaca," "Shooter"), Paige Turco ("The Game Plan," "Invincible"), and Vivian Wu ("The Pillow Book," "The Last Emperor")

programme.title: Death Of A Salesman
programme.desc: Willy Loman is an aging, traveling salesman, who despairs that his life his been lived in vain. Facing dispensability and insignificance in a heated, youthful economy, Willy is not ready to part with his cherished fantasies of an America that admires him for personable triumphs in the marketplace.

programme.title: The Journey
programme.desc: After 40 years of "The Troubles" in Northern Ireland the leading players meet at St. Andrews to try and hammer out a final and lasting peace agreement. The success of the talks depend on loyalist firebrand Ian Paisley and a former IRA Commander Martin McGuinnness, two sworn enemies, agreeing to share power. With the talks in extreme crisis the pair are forced by circumstance, or perhaps fate, to take a car journey together. After a series of initial bitter exchanges, their conversation begins to shift and cracks emerge in their armour.

programme.title: The Architect
programme.desc: While trying to build their dream home, a couple's lives are turned upside down after hiring an obsessive architect who insists on building his ideal home not theirs.

programme.title: Dominion: The Last Star Warrior
programme.desc: In five days the world changed. As a retired Intelligence agent turned UFO investigator races to discover the fate of the human race, an alien observer searchs for the human woman he loves.

programme.title: Robot Overlords
programme.desc: The adults lost the war and now the kids must save the world! Robots rule the streets and the people are locked in their homes. Stepping outside risks being vaporised by a hulking Sentry or picked off by a lethal Sniper. Through the ruins of Britain a group of kids, led by Callan McAuliffe, set out to join the Resistance. Hot on their heels however is their old teacher turned robot collaborator Mr Smythe, played by Ben Kingsley and his captive Gillian Anderson. Robot Overlords is a bombastic British blockbuster, packed with incredible special effects and rebellious excitement for all ages.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: In this live action movie-length version of the famous four, The Evil Shredder has returned to cause more mayhem and kidnaps the rat Ninja Master. But the Turtles have been armed with Professor Perry's Anti Mutant antidote and, with the help of a journalist, embark on an adventure to save the Ninja Master.

programme.title: Time Loop

programme.title: Superfast!
programme.desc: If you like cars…and you don\'t like going slow…then it\'s time to go fast and get furious. Undercover cop Lucas White joins Vin Serento\'s LA gang of illegal street racers as they plan to double cross LA\'s crime kingpin. The gang\'s outrageous wheel-spinning plan is as daring as it is ridiculous and will see them towing the whole damn restaurant, at crazy speeds, half-way across the city. But as Vin Serento says, \"It\'s not the car you drive... it\'s the driver who drives the car…who\'s doing the driving\”

programme.title: Bojan, beyond the smile
programme.desc: After hanging up his boots at the age of 32, Bojan Krkic decides to tell his story. Through a conversation with the psychonalyst who treated him when he made his debut with FC Barcelona at the age of 16, the documentary explores the difficulties encountered by a precocious and sensitive talent in the cruel world of football. People who have lived his career closely, such as Thierry Henry, Andrés Iniesta or Zlatan Ibrahimovic offer their point of view about Bojan, the footballer, and Bojan, the person, and reflect on the pressure, mental health and the management of expectations. An unpublished portrait of a promising player who has lived with success and failure in equal parts.

programme.title: Ona Carbonell: Starting Over
programme.desc: In August 2020, Olympic artistic swimmer Ona Carbonell became a first time mother, an experience that reshaped her life overnight. At the same time, Ona embarked on an ambitious plan to compete at the Tokyo Olympics. The documentary follows Ona during these intense 11 months, where she must push the limits to extraordinary degrees both physically and emotionally. Up close to Ona, we share her everyday routines and challenges, from breastfeeding and playing with baby Kai to the intense training sessions with the National Spanish Team.
